Description: Icon-only buttons must have accessible names
All form controls need labels or aria-label
Interactive elements must support keyboard interaction
Use semantic HTML before ARIA attributes
Async updates need aria-live for screen readers
Decorative icons should be hidden from screen readers
All interactive elements need visible focus states
Never remove outline without providing replacement
Checkbox/radio must share hit target with label
Inputs need autocomplete attribute for autofill
Use semantic input type attributes
Never prevent paste functionality
Disable spellcheck on emails and codes
Keep submit enabled and show spinner during requests
Show error messages inline near the problem field
Do: Inline error with focus on first error

Description: Virtualize lists exceeding 50 items
Do: Use virtual list for large datasets

Description: Avoid layout reads during render phase
Do: Read layout in effects or callbacks

Description: Group DOM operations to minimize reflows
Add preconnect links for CDN domains
Lazy-load images below the fold
URL should reflect current UI state
Stateful components should support deep-linking
Do: Enable sharing current view via URL

Description: Destructive actions require confirmation
Use proper Unicode characters
Handle text overflow properly
Use non-breaking spaces for units and brand names
Never disable zoom in viewport meta
Avoid transition: all - specify properties
Never use outline-none without replacement
Use Intl for date/number formatting
Icon-only buttons must expose an accessible label
Do: Set accessibilityLabel or label prop on icon buttons

Description: All inputs must have a visible label and an accessibility label
Do: Pair Text label with input and set accessibilityLabel

Description: Interactive elements must expose correct roles/traits
Don't: Rely on generic views with no roles

Description: Async status updates should be announced to screen readers
Don't: Update text silently with no announcement

Description: Decorative icons should be hidden from screen readers
Do: Mark decorative icons as not accessible
Don't: Have screen reader read every icon

Description: Primary touch targets must be at least 44x44pt
Do: Increase hitSlop or padding to meet minimum
Don't: Small icons with tiny touch area

Description: Adjacent touch targets need enough spacing
Do: Keep at least 8dp spacing between touchables
Don't: Cluster many buttons with no gap

Description: Custom gestures must not break system scroll/back
Don't: Full-screen custom swipe conflicting with back
Code Example Bad: PanResponder on full screen blocking back

Description: Back navigation should be predictable and preserve state
Do: Use navigation.goBack and keep screen state
Don't: Reset stack or exit app unexpectedly

Description: Bottom tab bar should have at most 5 primary items
Do: Use 3–5 tabs and move extras to More/Settings
Don't: Overloaded tab bar with many icons

Description: Modals/sheets must have clear close actions
Do: Provide close button and swipe-down where platform expects
Don't: Trapping users in modal with no obvious exit

Description: Returning to a screen should restore its scroll and form state
Do: Keep components mounted or persist state
Don't: Reset list scroll and form inputs on every visit

Description: Show visible feedback during network operations
Do: Use ActivityIndicator or skeleton for >300ms operations

Description: Confirm successful actions with brief feedback
Don't: Complete actions silently with no confirmation

Description: Show clear error messages near the problem
Don't: Only change border color with no explanation

Description: Validate inputs on blur or submit with clear messaging
Don't: Validate on every keystroke causing jank

Description: Use appropriate keyboardType and returnKeyType
Don't: Use default keyboard for all inputs

Description: Guide users through form fields with Next/Done flows
Do: Use onSubmitEditing to focus next input
Don't: Force users to tap each field manually

Description: Allow toggling password visibility securely
Don't: Force users to type blind with no option

Description: Use FlatList/SectionList for lists over ~50 items
Don't: Render hundreds of items with ScrollView

Description: Use correctly sized and cached images
Do: Use Image component with proper resizeMode and caching

Description: Debounce scroll/search callbacks to avoid jank
Don't: Run heavy logic on every event

Description: Micro-interactions should be 150–300ms with native-like easing
Do: Use ease-out for enter/ease-in for exit
Don't: Use long or linear animations for core UI

Description: Respect OS reduced-motion accessibility setting
Reserve infinite animations for loaders and live data
Body text must be readable and support Dynamic Type
Do: Use platform fontScale and at least 14–16pt base

Description: Support system text scaling without breaking layout
Do: Set allowFontScaling and test large text
Don't: Disable scaling on all text globally

Description: Content must not overlap notches/gesture bars
Do: Wrap screens in SafeAreaView or apply insets
Don't: Place tappable content under system bars

Description: Ensure sufficient contrast in both light and dark themes
Do: Use semantic tokens and test both themes
Don't: Reuse light-theme grays directly in dark mode

Description: Don't rely solely on hidden gestures for core actions
Do: Provide visible buttons in addition to gestures
Don't: Rely on swipe/shake only with no UI affordance
Code Example Good: Swipe to delete + visible Delete button
Code Example Bad: Only shake device to undo with no UI
